---
title: "U.S. Labor Market Trends (2020–2023)"
author: "Shahlan Finchan + Group 3"
date: "2026-02-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

## Importing Data 
```{r load-data, include = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

t9_2020_raw <- read_excel(
  "data/cps_2020_table9.xlsx",
  skip = 3
)

names(t9_2020_raw)
```
